name: Parmesan Deviled Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Halve the eggs lengthwise and remove the yolks, or halve the eggs crosswise, remove the yolks, and trim the ends of the whites to stand flat.
2. Sift or mash the yolks.
3. Combine the yolks with lemon juice, dry mustard, and Worcestershire sauce; mix well.
4. Stir in Parmesan cheese; season to taste with salt, white pepper, and cayenne.
5. Spoon into a pastry bag fitted with a star tip.
6. Pipe into egg whites.
7. Garnish as desired.
8. Serve slightly chilled or at room temperature.
